# remnawave_bandwidth_stats (Data Source)

Returns bandwidth statistics from the Remnawave panel.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "remnawave_bandwidth_stats" "monthly" {
  start = "2026-01-01T00:00:00+03:00"
  end   = "2026-01-31T23:59:59+03:00"
}

output "monthly_bandwidth" {
  value = data.remnawave_bandwidth_stats.monthly
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `end` (String) End date in YYYY-MM-DD format.
- `start` (String) Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

### Optional

- `top_nodes_limit` (Number) Maximum number of top nodes to return. Default: 20.

### Read-Only

- `categories` (List of String) Date category labels.
- `series` (Attributes List) Per-node bandwidth series. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--series))
- `sparkline_data` (List of Number) Aggregate bandwidth per category.
- `top_nodes` (Attributes List) Top nodes by bandwidth usage. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--top_nodes))

<a id="nestedatt--series"></a>
### Nested Schema for `series`

Read-Only:

- `color` (String)
- `country_code` (String)
- `data` (List of Number)
- `name` (String)
- `total` (Number)
- `uuid` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--top_nodes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `top_nodes`

Read-Only:

- `color` (String)
- `country_code` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `total` (Number)
- `uuid` (String)
